message:
🌱 dragonfly: Add support for Pub/Sub ACLs (#1279)

* 🌱 Add dragonfly: Add support for Pub/Sub ACLs mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct dragonfly namespace to dragonfly-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+    "title": "dragonfly: Add support for Pub/Sub ACLs",
+    "description": "Add support for Pub/Sub ACLs. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dragonfly deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dragonfly version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nhelm list -n dragonfly-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dragonfly installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dragonfly configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dragonfly-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nkubectl get configmap -n dragonfly-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly\n```\n**Did you search GitHub Issues and GitHub Discussions First?**\nYes\n\nWe are implementing Dragonfly for a multi-tenant application."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add support for Pub/Sub ACLs",
+        "description": "This PR adds support for `pub/sub` ACL's. After it is merged the feature is feature complete :)\r\n\n* add support for pub/sub\n* add tests\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nkubectl get events -n dragonfly-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add support for Pub/Sub ACLs\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds support for `pub/sub` ACL's. After it is merged the feature is feature complete :)\r\n\n* add support for pub/sub\n* add tests",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
